slides.title: Mints hide bad breath, *not fix it*.
slides.sub: A mint covers the smell for ten minutes. Real fresh breath is about saliva, bacteria and your gut.

slides.title: Dry mouth smells
slides.body: Saliva is your built-in cleaner, and a *dry mouth lets odor bacteria* thrive. Sip water all day.

slides.title: Scrape your tongue
slides.body: Most odor bacteria live on the *back of your tongue*. A daily scrape clears more smell than any rinse.

slides.title: Beat morning breath
slides.body: Mouth-breathing all night *dries you out* into morning breath. Nose-breathe and hydrate before bed.

slides.title: Your gut talks too
slides.body: Skipped meals, 'keto breath' and gut issues can *leak odor onto your breath*. Eat regularly; note triggers.

slides.title: Trapped plaque smells
slides.body: Plaque between teeth and *early gum disease* smell. Floss daily and see a dentist for regular cleanings.

slides.title: Fresh breath, *fixed at the root*.
slides.body: Vibe Health tracks the water and regular meals that keep your mouth fresh from the inside — in one daily score.
slides.tag: fresh breath, fixed at the root

caption:
Mints just cover bad breath for ten minutes. Real freshness comes from saliva, a clean tongue and your gut. 🌿

Sip water, scrape your tongue, nose-breathe, eat regularly, floss daily. Save this. 🔖

Vibe Health tracks the water and meals that keep your mouth fresh → link in bio.
youtube_title: Mints Hide Bad Breath — Here's the Real Fix
